parsed.answer: While a tool is in progress, Claude Code displays the tool name with a present-progressive label and an animated spinner. After completion, the verb shifts to past tense. Results appear below the tool call entry.

claims.statement: In-progress tools show an animated spinner alongside the tool name
In-progress tools use present-progressive verb forms (e.g., 'Reading...')
Completed tools shift to past tense (e.g., 'Read file')
Results appear below the tool call entry after completion
The spinner disappears once the tool completes
Bash command output (stdout/stderr) is displayed after completion

parsed.uncertainty_notes: Moderate uncertainty about exact visual formatting.
